rulings.Case Title: JULIA ELLIS VS. HARRAH'S ENTERTAINMENT, INC., A CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, March 30, 2011, line 3. PLAINTIFF JULIA ELLIS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Plaintiffs' motion for summary adjudication is denied. Plaintiff concedes that the only issues that remain in dispute are the nature and amount of damages. A decision on the issue of liability against the party on whom liability is sought to be imposed does not result in judgment until the issue of damages is resolved. Dept. of Industrial Relations v. U.I. Video Stores (1997) 55 Cal.App. 4th 1084, 1097. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: GABRIELA FLORES et al VS. PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC COMPANY et al

rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, March 30, 2011, line 4. DEFENDANT NUTE ENGINEERING, INC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff shall be required to file a certificate of merit and to plead specific facts and allegations pertinent to defendant's liability for plaintiff's claims. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: SUSAN WHITEHOUSE VS. PACIFIC BELL TELEPHONE COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Re-Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Subpoena Of Plaintiff'S Medical Records And/Or Alternative Motion For Protective Order, Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, March 30, 2011, line 1. rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM RUSCONI et al VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, March 30, 2011, line 14. 270 VALENCIA STREET LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant's demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff's concede in the petition that they have not exhausted their administrative remedies. The petition on its face fails to state facts sufficient to show that pursuing such administrative remedies would be futile. There is no reasonable probability that plaintiff can amend to correct the deficiency. =(302/LMG)
